violations.text: The menus were lacking an allergy statement. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the walk-in have an accumulation of dust, food residue and grease. The nonfood contact areas of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Shelving and ice machine to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025
The ceiling in the small side room prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Tiles to be changed to approved material. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The floor and wall junctures do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
